expectations.text: Looks for relevant patterns elsewhere in this repository instead of inventing the design in isolation.
expectations.evidence: The response ties the design to create-plan, create-tasks, code-explorer, code-architect, and implement-plan rather than inventing a standalone pattern.

expectations.text: Defines the planning artifact and what information it should contain for handoff.
expectations.evidence: It proposes implementation-brief.md under .agents/scratchpad/<feature-name>/ and lists summary, goals, findings, technical context, assumptions, design, implementation map, validation plan, and promotion path.

expectations.text: Provides a concrete implementation map with file-level changes.
expectations.evidence: It names concrete edits to skills/feature-dev/SKILL.md, a new references/implementation-brief-template.md file, code-explorer.md, code-architect.md, and an optional implement-plan follow-up.

expectations.text: Includes rationale or trade-offs for the proposed design.
expectations.evidence: The output explains why a lighter bridge artifact is preferable to forcing all delegated work through plan.md and tasks.md and notes the trade-off of introducing another artifact type.

claims.claim: Another artifact type risks overlap with plan.md.
claims.evidence: The trade-off section explicitly calls out overlap with plan.md as the primary design risk.

uncertainties: The exact artifact path and promotion requirements still need product decisions.
needs_review: One exploratory directory listing failed before the output directory existed.
workarounds: Grounded the proposal with direct reads after the directory listing issue.
